'''βàöy-l-z-zh''' ('''kayalzezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jaga|jaga]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jaga|jaga]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöy-l-z-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kayalzezhoko
|}
